productDisplayName: Rockport Men Utara L2T Grey Casual Shoes
description: Designed for the man who never compromises on style and comfort, this Utara L2T shoe from rockport makes for a great addition to your casual wardrobe. UpperTextured leather upper in a distressed look, with a suede innerLeather overlay as a toe cap for enhanced durabilityLacing system for a snug, customised FitadiPRENE inserts in the footbed for a custom fit and impact protectionMidsolePhylon midsole for all day comfort and impact protectionOutsoleDurable textured rubber outsole in the forefoot and durable textured gum rubber outsole in the backfoot for absolute grip and tractionShoe careWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
